_readme: Hand-audited cam decisions from the 2026-07-07 window review (owner found
Nara/Osaka's 'window' was a sky-cam slideshow). fetch_windy.py APPLIES this
file after matching, and tools/prune_windy.py applies it to an existing
data/windy.json. drop_entry removes the place's whole Windy entry;
drop_live / drop_window remove one tier. reviewed_keep documents cams that
LOOK far/odd but were verified as genuinely of the place — do not re-flag.
Distances alone mislead: region-scale places (parks, coasts, islands) can
have a great cam 40km from their centroid, and a city can have a junk one
at 0km (Seattle's was an I-5 traffic cam).

drop_entry.aa-hypogeum: cam is on Gozo, 31km and a ferry away
drop_entry.aa-tetzcotzinco: cam is Mexico City Santa Fe, 50km away
drop_entry.banjul: cam is a lodge in Senegal, 39km away

drop_entry.frankfurt: cam is Großer Feldberg mountain 21km — not the city
drop_entry.marrakesh: cam is Oukaïmeden observatory 49km in the Atlas
